headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Omnicom Group, Raises Price Target to $83
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Benjamin Swinburne   maintains Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $82 to $83.
